title: Fishing Licenses * Foster Children - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Fishing Licenses * Foster Children 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF FISH AND WILDLIFE FISHING AND HUNTING LICENSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF State agency provides oversight of hunting and fishing licenses. Licenses are not required for children under age 12 when accompanied by an adult with a current fishing license. Offers free fishing licenses to youth in foster care. Youth should contact their certifier or caseworker. 4034 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 388-6363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF FISH AND WILDLIFE FISHING AND HUNTING LICENSES
